---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behavior in PaperStack
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the Bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the problem.

## Environment

- **Device:** (e.g., iPhone 13, Samsung Galaxy S21, Desktop)
- **OS:** (e.g., iOS 17, Android 14, Windows 11, macOS 15)
- **Browser:** (e.g., Chrome 120, Safari 17, Firefox 121)
- **PWA or Browser:** (Are you using the installed PWA or the browser?)

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here.
